category_sources: Official Ghostgum page describes Epstool as a utility for EPS previews, bounding boxes, and bitmap conversion.
source_facts.description says it edits preview images and fixes bounding boxes in EPS files.
display_name_sources: Official Ghostgum page title is Epstool.
docs_sources: Official Ghostgum Epstool page provides overview, feature list, examples, and downloads.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Ghostgum page provides release archives but no official source-control repository was identified.
tags_sources: Official Ghostgum page lists EPS preview creation/extraction, Ghostscript bitmap previews, and bounding-box repair.
source_facts.description names EPS preview and bounding-box editing.
